Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Encounter Records RIFs │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
10 
BENE_STATE 
LABEL: 
State of Beneficiary (postal abbreviation) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the two-letter postal abbreviation for the state where the beneficiary lives. 
SHORT NAME: BENE_STATE 
LONG NAME: BENE_STATE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) and CMS/Census Bureau crosswalk (derived) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base
